items.title: Medicare weight loss drug pilot on ice as insurers decline to contribute
items.summary: The US Government will now pick up the cost of weight loss drugs offered through the Medicare GLP-1 Bridge scheme until 31 December 2027.

items.title: Immunotherapy in locally advanced HNSCC: is there still room for new agents?
items.summary: The treatment landscape for locally advanced head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (LA HNSCC) has changed significantly.

items.title: MSD-backed Ray locks in $125m to back eye drug pipeline
items.summary: Ray's MSD and Novo Holdings-backed Series B will shed light on the potential of the company's vision restoration gene therapy pipeline.

items.title: FDA approves MSD’s once-daily HIV combo Idvynso
items.summary: GlobalData analysts forecast a blockbuster future for Idvynso, though they note it is unlikely it will displace market dominator, Biktarvy.

items.title: BioAegis and Prenosis partner for inflammatory disease therapies
items.summary: BioAegis Therapeutics has entered a strategic partnership with Prenosis to advance AI-driven precision medicine for inflammatory diseases.
